important_emails.subject: UptimeRobot: new videos + a Discord community brewing
important_emails.snippet: New videos, a Discord community brewing, and questions for you Your UptimeRobot. Monthly Update. Hi there, Ele here, UptimeRobot's new Developer Advocate. Each month, I'll share what we're
important_emails.body_preview:
Hi there,

Ele here, UptimeRobot's new Developer Advocate. Each month I'll share what we're up to: new videos, Discord community highlights, and what's shipping. Between issues, find me on X: https://sesweb.uptimerobot.com/l/ACTNk01nVq0xr1bIOwyg7A/imt7zuoj1RC892qIseIM3xqA/TktG26US2u6cPd9AyGhx2w

Speaking of Discord — we just opened our community server. It's early and still taking shape, but if you want to be one of the first in (and help shape what it becomes), come say hi. I'm eleftheria_u
